items.title: docs: clarify plugin package live proof (#99962)
items.summary: docs: clarify plugin package live proof (#99962) Summary: - The branch adds plugin package live-proof guidance to the testing skill and plugin docs, separating npm-pack package validation from official-trust proof and documenting runtime dependency and compiled-entry checks. - PR surface: Docs +111. Total +111 across 3 files. - Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a documentation and skill-guidance clarification PR rather than a bug report.
